raw.message: Ready to build your own bakery and wow every customer?

hook.summary: Split-screen comparison of bakery themes with a prompt to start.
hook.visual_action: A hand cursor clicks on a modern bakery floor, which then transitions into a bustling, high-traffic restaurant scene.
hook.text_overlay: GAMES LIVE Run your bakery now

scene_flow: Split-screen introduction showing different bakery styles and a 'GAMES LIVE' banner.
Transition to a zoomed-in view of a crowded, successful restaurant floor with many customers.
A multi-level view showcasing various themed restaurant floors connected by stairs.
Final end card featuring the game title and a call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: Casual players who enjoy cozy management games and cute, detailed 2D art styles.
